id.description: The mailbox sequence ID (historyId). Google publishes it as a uint64-formatted string; the incremental cursor is compared/ordered as the string this API itself emits (matches Gmail's own startHistoryId contract).

messages_added.description: Raw HistoryMessageAdded[] entries added in this history record (each carries a nested message.id/threadId).

messages_deleted.description: Raw HistoryMessageDeleted[] entries removed (not trashed) in this history record.

labels_added.description: Raw HistoryLabelAdded[] entries: labels added to messages in this history record.

labels_removed.description: Raw HistoryLabelRemoved[] entries: labels removed from messages in this history record.
